name: Vegetarian Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and green bell pepper; sauté until tender.
2. Stir in garlic, chili powder, crushed tomatoes, and kidney beans. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Simmer the mixture for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in shredded cheddar cheese until melted.
5. Spoon the chili into individual bowls of hot cooked brown rice.
6. Garnish with chopped green onions.
